# Master Service Agreement (Template)

> **Read this first:** this is a starting draft, not a vetted legal contract. An MSA governs real money and real liability — have a qualified solicitor review and adapt this before using it with an actual client. This document should not be treated as legal advice.

This Master Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between **Aegis Health AI Ltd**, a company registered in England and Wales (Company No. 16695420), trading as "Aegis AI" ("Aegis"), and **[Client Legal Name]** ("Client").

This Agreement sets out the general terms governing all work between the parties. Specific project scope, price, and timeline are set out in individual Statements of Work ("SOWs"), each of which incorporates this Agreement by reference.

## 1. Services
Aegis will provide the services described in each signed SOW. In the event of conflict between this Agreement and an SOW on project-specific matters (scope, price, timeline), the SOW governs; on general matters (liability, confidentiality, IP, termination), this Agreement governs.

## 2. Fees and payment
Fees for each project are as stated in the relevant SOW. Late payment (more than 14 days overdue) entitles Aegis to pause work without breach until payment is received.

## 3. Intellectual property and ownership
Ownership of the final deliverables (code, content, designs) created specifically for the Client transfers to the Client upon receipt of final payment for the relevant SOW, per [`PaymentSystem.md`](../PaymentSystem.md). Aegis retains ownership of any pre-existing tools, frameworks, or reusable components (e.g. the productized AI Concierge codebase) used to deliver the work, and grants the Client a license to use them as embedded in the delivered project — this does not entitle the Client to extract, resell, or redistribute Aegis's underlying reusable components independently of the delivered project.

## 4. Confidentiality
Each party agrees to keep the other's confidential business information private, both during and after the engagement, except where disclosure is required by law.

## 5. Data protection
Where Aegis processes personal data on the Client's behalf as part of a project (e.g. building a system that stores the Client's own customer data), the parties will enter into a separate Data Processing Agreement (`docs/templates/DataProcessingAgreement.md`) governing that specific relationship.

## 6. Warranties and liability
Aegis warrants that services will be performed with reasonable skill and care. Aegis does not guarantee specific business outcomes (revenue, lead volume, rankings) resulting from delivered work — see the site's Terms of Service for the same principle applied to the public-facing site.

To the extent permitted by law, Aegis's total liability arising from any SOW is limited to the fees paid under that SOW. Neither party is liable for indirect or consequential losses.

## 7. Term and termination
Either party may terminate a specific SOW for material breach not remedied within 14 days of written notice. On termination, the Client pays for work completed to that point; any deposit already paid for undelivered work beyond that point is refunded pro-rata, less any non-recoverable third-party costs already incurred.

## 8. Governing law
This Agreement is governed by the laws of England and Wales, and the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of its courts.
